title: Luckyland
lyrics:
No coin in my pocket, there's no bill in your wallet
No coin in your pocket, no bill in your wallet
What are you gonna do?
Come down to Luckyman, it's over
No coin in your pocket, no bill in your wallet
Now you're lost too, what you gonna do?
Come down to Luckyland, I got the issue
Luckyland, come down to Luckylandslots.com
Luckyland, free spins daily, free spins daily
Do it Bryan, nope, none
And that guy got a big ol' check, man
Got those bills too, boo, yeah
All the bills are due, everything's going wrong
You're sitting there next to your girl being uh
I'm sorry boo, what we gonna do?
You got some money I can lend though?
Now here's the thing you do, follow my advice
Get to your computer, your tablet, your phone
Go to Luckylandslots.com
Free spins daily, free money daily
You could be your next millionaire
Big checks, big checks, big checks
You could be the next thing there
Now you don't have to borrow from her
And you're a millionaire, you got your girl there
She's loving you, you got your boy there
He's loving you too
Everybody's singing, dancing on the ceiling
That's what Luckyland can do, that's what Luckyland can do
Big checks, big checks, big checks
Little small checks, every kind of check
Luckyland'll take it to you
Even if you don't got anything
Nothing in your pocket, no way to invest
You could still be there, Luckyland's next
I'm broke, man, I ain't got no dough
Got no coin in my pocket
You got no bills in your wallet
I know it's true, what you gonna do?
Come with me and fund the band
Get down to Luckyland, Luckyland
Come down and fund the band
Get down to Luckyland, it's true
No purchase necessary, all rules apply
You should read the fine print, man, it's true
No purchase necessary, all the rules apply
You should read the fine print, man, it's true
Come down to Luckyland
Down to Luckyland
Free spins daily, get that streak in
You could be the next one, man, with those
Big checks, big checks, big checks
Like me
Got the big checks, big checks, big checks
Like me, BryanM
You see it sitting right there
Got the big checks, got the big checks
What are you gonna do?
Little hands
Come down to Luckyland
Put that money in your hand
Come on down to Luckyland
Put the money in your hand
No purchase necessary, no purchase necessary
That's the best words you ever heard, right?
Come down to Luckyland
You could be the next winner
If you smart, you do like Brian do
And go pick up your big check
What are you gonna do?







Got the big checks, got the big checks
All the rules apply
You could be the next one, man, with those
Big checks, big checks, big checks
What are you gonna do?
